shared_attributes.design_principle: simple shapes, clear motion, temporary display

context.role: sparkle particle after cleaning floor, visualizes successful cleaning action
context.screen_position: spawns on floor area (y=110-125, random x), appears in place
context.usage_scenario: spawns 3 sparkles when player cleans floor, appears briefly at random floor positions, shows cleanliness achieved

visual_specification.shape: star/sparkle symbol, 3x3px cross or plus shape

animation.description: spawns at random floor positions, appears with quick flash (3 frames: small, large, fade), no movement, disappears after 0.5 seconds, 3 sparkles spawn simultaneously when cleaning

visual_specification.details: white/cream sparkle (#FFF1E8), 3x3px star/cross shape, spawns 3 at once when floor is cleaned, appears in place (no motion), quick flash animation (0.5 sec), positive feedback for cleaning action

relationships.shared_with: color matches background (#FFF1E8) for bright flash effect
relationships.differences_from: no motion (appears in place), shortest lifespan (0.5 sec), triggered by cleaning action (not continuous), positive feedback particle

explicit_negations: no more than 3 sparkles at once
